channel.title: Grind -- Specialty Coffee Bangalore
channel.description: Premium specialty coffee delivered fast in Bangalore

item.g:title: HARMONIC HILLS Robusta
item.g:description: HARMONIC HILLS Robusta

item.g:title: Subko VLGE
item.g:description: Subko VLGE

item.g:title: Project Seven Sisters
item.g:description: Project Seven Sisters

item.g:title: A Fine Balance
item.g:description:
A Fine Balance (AFB) is a medium-roasted, single-origin coffee processed using the washed method. "Fine Balance" highlights the coffee’s smooth integration of acidity, body, flavor, and aroma. A customer favorite since 2018, this roast profile delivers a well-rounded and flavorful experience without extreme bitterness, sourness, or heaviness.
Sweetness: 4.5/5 – Molasses-like sweetness at the start
Body: 3/5 – Medium body with a smooth texture
Acidity: 3.5/5 – Clean acidity with an umami finish
Bitterness: 2/5 – Light cocoa bitterness upfront, balancing the overall cup

item.g:title: Selection
item.g:description:
This coffee is ideal for those who savour a strong and full-bodied cup. It lends itself perfectly for an espresso or moka pot brew – a bold coffee experience. Savour the creamy and buttery notes with hints of chocolate. Best enjoyed black or even with a splash of milk.
Not sure which grind to order? Checkout our grind size chart below for a quick brew tip!

item.g:title: Cold brew - Light & Bright
item.g:description:
ight & Bright is a 'sessionable' cold brew, which means you can keep sipping on multiple glasses of this gorgeous drink through the day. Light & Bright is a light roast Arabica, with a brightness that's perfect for the summer and a smooth, mellow finish
Light & Bright isn't recommended if you like your cold brew with milk or any whitener. Add lots of cubes of ice, some water, and you're set! Options include adding tonic water instead of water, gingerale, or soda and a slice of orange. Go ahead, get innovative,
Light & Bright is one of our 3 unique cold brew coffees for 2021. Check out the others here.
Don't have a cold brew maker? No worries, buy one here
Bean: Arabica
Process: Washed, some naturals added.
Roast Profile: Light roast.
Tasting notes: Fresh ripe fruit, Citrus.

item.g:title: Uru Blend
item.g:description: Groundup's Uru Blend is a crowd favorite, perfectly balancing Arabica and Robusta beans sourced from Salawara Estate and roasted to a medium-dark profile. Crafted specifically to suit the South Indian palate, this blend offers smooth sweetness upfront, harmoniously balanced by subtle bitter undertones. It's loved by those who appreciate a robust yet well-rounded cup. Ideal for traditional filter coffee, Uru Blend provides a long-lasting finish that evokes comforting nostalgia reminiscent of home-brewed mornings. The specially selected washed Robusta beans in this blend are a true game-changer.

item.g:title: Vienna Roast
item.g:description: Vienna Roast

item.g:title: Monsoon Malabar
item.g:description: Experience the rich essence of our Monsoon Malabar coffee, a tribute to age-old traditions from the British Raj's seafaring days. This brew is an earthy symphony of bold flavors, infused with the warmth of aromatic spices and deep, dark chocolate notes. Perfectly balanced for any time of day, it’s a cup you’ll want to savor again and again. Our tip? Keep a second bag close—you won’t be able to resist a refill.

item.g:title: South Indian Filter Coffee [100% Coffee] (Arabica + Robusta)
item.g:description:
Our tribute to the original South Indian coffee blend, with a playful twist – no added Chicory. Single-origin fine Arabicas and Robustas go into the making of our South Indian Blend. Processed to perfection with a combination of washed and unwashed techniques, results in bestowing the beans with a rounded texture and a surprising burst of flavour and spices.
This blend is perfect for your morning Pick-me-up with its sharp aroma, balanced acidity and mouth-fullness, and the familiar comfort of South Indian Filter coffee. Perfectly complemented with milk and sugar, excels in a Moka Pot or a South Indian Filter.

item.g:title: St. Joseph Estate
item.g:description: St. Joseph Estate

item.g:title: House Blend - Light Roast
item.g:description:
Our house blend is a carefully curated mix of single-origin 100% Arabica coffees grown from single regions in Coorg. Two techniques are employed to process these Arabica cherries – Washed and fermented, Unwashed and naturally sun-dried. This mix of processing techniques is a blender’s delight resulting in a delicious combination of beans that complement each other.
This innovative mix of beans when lightly roasted offers distinctive fruit & berry notes with a light, clarified body, and a berry-tea rose aroma. With a slightly higher caffeine content, this light roast house blend is perfect for a drip technique using a Pour-Over or a Chemex.

item.g:title: Signature South Indian Filter
item.g:description: Inspired by the classic South Indian coffee, our blend is a bold tribute to tradition. The rich, burnt caramel notes of Arabica Washed coffee perfectly complement the smooth, syrupy texture of Robusta Natural, creating a robust yet comforting flavor. With hints of milk chocolate and roasted almonds, this blend shines whether paired with milk and sugar, as a strong espresso, or brewed in a Moka Pot.

item.g:title: Cold brew - Dark & Fruity
item.g:description:
Dark & Fruity is for those who love their cold brew coffee with a heavier body, rich, and flavourful. Cold Brew - Dark & Fruity is a medium dark roast and the brew works well if had with a few cubes of ice and a splash of water (enjoy the Shiraz-like notes!). Go ahead and add milk or cream if you like, Dark & Fruity tastes great with this too.
Dark & Fruity is one of our 3 unique cold brew coffees for 2021. Check out the others here.
If you'd like an simple and easy to use cold brew maker, check it out here
Bean: Arabica
Process: Honey, Wet-process.

item.g:title: Cold Brew Blend (Arablica + Robusta)
item.g:description:
Our Cold brew blend is an exquisite mix of single-origin Arabica beans and Robusta beans, processed with washed and unwashed techniques, for maximum aroma and a full body.
This Medium-dark roasted blend has whiffs of maple and honey while offering notes of strong Cocoa & dark chocolate, finishing off with a creamy, well-rounded mouthfeel. Best steeped slowly over time using the Drip or Immersion technique.

item.g:title: Parama
item.g:description:
Parama is a versatile coffee (a blend of arabica -92%, and robusta - 8%) with peaberry beans of both variants. The small amount of Robusta makes this a perfectly balanced coffee and also makes it perfect for espresso brewing. Parama is great with milk, but is also nice as a black coffee that's slightly on the deeper side. Parama is a medium roast coffee.
Parama has notes of chocolate and caramel. Parama is the house blend that's served in our cafes in Bangalore and Delhi.
Bean: Arabica, Robusta, Peaberry of both.

item.g:title: Speciality Single Origin Chikmagalur Region
item.g:description: Situated in the beautiful Chikmagalur region of Karnataka, we are proud producers of hand-picked and sun-dried Arabica coffee. Our coffee plants grow alongside pepper, cacao, and cardamom, creating a vibrant blend of flavors. When you savor a cup of our coffee, you'll experience the delightful combination of sweet honey and raisin. And to add a touch of fruity goodness, there's a juicy peach note that perfectly balances the overall taste. It's a coffee that's carefully crafted to deliver a truly satisfying and enjoyable experience.

item.g:title: Clouds In My Coffee
item.g:description: Clouds in My Coffee is a Monsooned Malabar coffee. Our single estate Arabica green coffee beans are kept in shipping containers by the coast for a few months. The moist sea air is absorbed by the beans and they bloat up and turn whitish. The taste profile of the coffee changes completely and makes for a really interesting specialty black coffee. Perfect for Americano or single-serve coffees such as pour-over / French press etc.

item.g:title: Attikan Estate
item.g:description: Attikan Estate

item.g:title: Vienna Roast
item.g:description: Discover the richness of our Vienna Roast, a smooth, dark blend that offers a decadent combination of flavors. Indulge in the deep, bittersweet taste of dark chocolate, complemented by the sweet warmth of maple syrup and the subtle crunch of toasted walnut. Crafted for a refined coffee experience, it’s a perfect pick for those who crave a bold yet silky-smooth cup.

item.g:title: EVERYDAY SUNSHINE: ARABICA FERMENTED NATURALS
item.g:description: From the heart of Coorg, this Fermented Natural Arabica finds its symphony of flavours from our unique processing methods and the estate’s rich climate. Picture a summer orchard, biting into a juicy peach and the sweet aromatics of ripe Mandarin orange surrounding you. That’s what the smooth body and lingering sweetness of this coffee can make you feel. Each cup is truly memorable - a taste of Coorg’s sunshine in every sip.

item.g:title: Cappuccino Blend
item.g:description:
Our Cappuccino blend brings out the best of both worlds – where two coffee beans combine for an intoxicating brew with a Malty, Raisin-like, and buttery aroma. Single-origin Arabicas and Single-origin Robustas undergo a mix of processing techniques, resulting in a delicious combination of beans that complement each other.
This Medium-Dark Roast blend reveals itself with every mouthful. A tango of flavour – salty- sweet Caramel, strong Cocoa, smooth dark chocolate, come together and end in a perfect velvety finish. The flavours of this blend are enhanced when complemented by milk, best brewed through a Moka Pot, or Bean to Cup machine.

item.g:title: Parama Dark
item.g:description:
Parama Dark is a versatile coffee (a blend of arabica -92%, and robusta - 8%), a dark roasted version of our bestseller 'Parama', with peaberry beans of both variants. The small amount of Robusta makes this a perfectly balanced coffee and also makes it perfect for espresso brewing. Parama Dark is great with milk, but is also nice as a black coffee that's slightly on the darker side. Parama is a medium-dark coffee.
Parama has notes of chocolate and caramel. Parama is the house blend that's served in our cafes in Bangalore and Delhi.
Bean: Arabica, Robusta, Peaberry of both.
Process: Multiple processes - Washed, natural, honey, smoked.

item.g:title: South Indian Filter Coffee [80% Coffee, 20% Chicory]
item.g:description:
Our homage to the original South Indian coffee blend, has whiffs of dark chocolate and an intoxicating pungency that we have all come to associate with the filter coffee we so love. Single-origin fine Arabicas and Robustas go into the making of our South Indian Blend. Processed to perfection with a combination of washed & unwashed techniques, results in bestowing the beans with a rounded texture and a surprising burst of flavour and spices.
The potent notes of unsweetened cocoa, playfully mingle with notes of spices, give this coffee its powerful yet comforting flavor. Blended with 20% Chicory, It holds its own to milk and sugar, and also excels in a Moka Pot or a South Indian Filter.

item.g:title: Sunkissed
item.g:description: Sunkissed is our honey sun-dried coffee. While naturally processing the coffee, we leave a lot of the fruity pulp on the bean and allow it to mellow out in filtered sunshine for a week or so. The fruitiness from the pulp gets into the bean and creates a fruity, citrussy cup. Sunkissed is an award-winning specialty Robusta.

item.g:title: Winter Blend
item.g:description: Winter Blend

item.g:title: Speciality Single Origin Bababudangiri Region
item.g:description:
Embark on a remarkable journey through the rich heritage of coffee cultivation in the hallowed grounds of Baba Budan Giri hills. This renowned destination, named after the legendary merchant Baba Budan, who deftly transported precious coffee seeds from Yemen, stands as the embodiment of India's esteemed coffee culture.
Immerse yourself in our exceptional roast, where you will discover a delightful interplay of flavors. Experience the gentle sweetness of juicy passionfruit balanced by the lively brightness of pineapple. As the temperature gradually descends, a captivating essence of richer molasses emerges, offering a truly indulgent sensation.
This coffee is meticulously crafted through a natural processing method, wherein the coffee beans are dried alongside the cherry, resulting in a remarkable symphony of complex, fruity, and sweet flavors. Only the finest, fully ripened cherries are meticulously handpicked, expertly sorted, and sun-dried on African raised beds, ensuring a pristine and flawless quality.

item.g:title: French Roast
item.g:description: French Roast

item.g:title: French Roast
item.g:description: Hailing from the misty green hills of Karnataka's Nilgiris, this exquisite dark roast is a true indulgence. With rich notes of toffee, roasted hazelnut, and the subtle crunch of cocoa nibs, each sip offers a full-bodied experience with a bittersweet undertone. Enjoy this decadent brew and let it whisk you away to a sunny day at a cozy Parisian café.

item.g:title: Modur Naturals
item.g:description:
Modur Estate has been growing coffee since the 1930s. Positioned on the northern slopes of the western ghats under a thick canopy that ensures even and gentle ripening of the coffee cherry, the estate lies at an altitude of 3250 feet.
The freshly harvested coffee cherries are transported to our estate at Polibetta where they are laid out to dry on our brick drying yard under a gentle winter sun.

item.g:title: Grand Reserve
item.g:description:
Easily one of our most refined offerings, Grand Reserve is distinguished by its silky, full-bodied mouthfeel, intense flavours and just a touch of acidity. It’s drawn from the highest and finest plots – the Grand Cru – among our coffees. It makes for a bold cup that can be savoured black or with a splash of milk.
Not sure which grind to order? Checkout our grind size chart below for a quick brew tip!

item.g:title: Baarbara Estate
item.g:description: Baarbara Estate

item.g:title: Mooleh Manay: Coorg, Karnataka | Excelsa | 84 Hours Yeast Inoculated Natural | Medium Roast
item.g:description: Mooleh Manay: Coorg, Karnataka | Excelsa | 84 Hours Yeast Inoculated Natural | Medium Roast

item.g:title: Silver Oak Cafe Blend
item.g:description: Silver Oak Cafe Blend

item.g:title: Cold Brew Blend Bold
item.g:description: Cold Brew Blend Bold

item.g:title: Project 360 Black Honey
item.g:description: Project 360 Black Honey

item.g:title: Monsoon Malabar AA- Hoysala Estate
item.g:description: Monsoon Malabar AA- Hoysala Estate

item.g:title: Dhak Blend
item.g:description: Dhak Blend

item.g:title: BOLD WHISPERS
item.g:description: BOLD WHISPERS

item.g:title: Amaltas Blend
item.g:description: Amaltas Blend

item.g:title: Deep Bliss (Arabica, Robusta)
item.g:description: Deep Bliss is a rich, strong and robust coffee blend. It is a mix of Arabica and Robusta, both single estate, with lots of earthy flavours brought in by the naturally processed coffee cherry that forms a big part of this blend. Deep bliss is a great idea if you like your coffee with a little splash or ten of milk.

item.g:title: Naturals
item.g:description:
﻿Wake up to the aroma of The Caffeine Baar's Natural coffee. For this product, luscious ripened coffee cherries are fermented for 24 hours and dried on raised beds, till you get a burst of flavour with every sip.
Roasted for - Filter
Recommended Brewing Equipment - V60 and Inverted Aeropress

item.g:title: Rohan Bopanna's Masterblend
item.g:description:
With the green beans for this roast coming from the tennis star's own coffee estate in Coorg, the Rohan Bopanna masterblend is a medium-dark roast single estate arabica. The arabica from the same estate is processed in two different ways to give this coffee an interesting body and a clean flavour.
100% Arabica

item.g:title: Honey Sun Dried
item.g:description:
Let The Caffeine Baar's Honey Sun Dried coffee beguile you. For this fragrant offering, cherries are pulped and sun-dried with a thick layer of mucilage to ensure sweet and fruity flavours with every sip.
Roasted for - Espresso
Recommended Brewing Equipment -Aeropress, Iced Coffee

item.g:title: Ratnagiri Estate
item.g:description: Grown on the lush slopes of the Ratnagiri estate in Karnataka, this medium-roast coffee showcases the depth and elegance of its terroir. Carefully hand-picked and expertly roasted, the beans develop a rich, comforting profile. In the cup, you’ll discover deep notes of dried plum and raisin, bringing a natural sweetness and gentle fruit complexity. These flavors are grounded by smooth cocoa undertones that add warmth and balance. The medium roast enhances body and sweetness while preserving clarity, resulting in a well-rounded, indulgent coffee that’s both comforting and refined.

item.g:title: Whiskey Barrel Aged
item.g:description:
Introducing The Caffeine Baar’s newest creation: Whiskey Barrel Aged Coffee. Washed green beans are aged for 120 days in authentic whiskey barrels, soaking in the rich essence of oak and whiskey. They are then meticulously roasted to deliver bold, indulgent notes of cocoa nibs, oak, and pecan. Experience this innovative take on cold brew—barrel on the rocks.
Roasted for - Filter
Recommended Brewing Equipment - Cold Brew

item.g:title: 72 Hour Fermented Washed
item.g:description: The Caffeine Baar presents its 72 hour fermented washed coffee. For this delightful offering, wet-processed coffee is fermented in stainless steel tanks for 72 hours till it offers a full-bodied flavour with every sip.

item.g:title: Signature Salawara Blend
item.g:description:
Our Premium Signature Salawara Blend is a medium-dark roast, meticulously handcrafted exclusively for Groundup by world-renowned coffee expert Ms. Sunalini Menon. Sourced from the esteemed Salawara Estate, the beans are carefully roasted and profiled to deliver an exceptional coffee experience. This blend showcases delicate fragrance complemented by refined citrus and caramel aromatics, dotted with delightful hints of milk chocolate. Smooth, soft, and intensely flavorful, it offers an escape for your senses and leaves you longing for more. Ideal for drip filters or espresso, Signature Salawara Blend is perfect enjoyed with milk, half-and-half, or simply black.
Sweetness: 3.5/5 – Noticeable caramel and chocolate sweetness
Body: 4/5 – Smooth and creamy
Acidity: 3.5/5 – Bright citrus notes upfront
Bitterness: 2.5/5 – Balanced bitterness for a long-lasting finish

item.g:title: Project Pearl, Ratnagiri Estate, Karnataka (SCA 86+): Culture naturals+ Anaerobic Naturals: Filter Roast (Light)
item.g:description: Project Pearl, Ratnagiri Estate, Karnataka (SCA 86+): Culture naturals+ Anaerobic Naturals: Filter Roast (Light)

item.g:title: House Blend - Medium Roast
item.g:description:
Our house blend is a carefully curated mix of single-origin 100% Arabica coffees grown from single regions in Coorg. Two techniques are employed to process these Arabica cherries – Washed and fermented, Unwashed and naturally sun-dried. This mix of processing techniques is a blender’s delight resulting in a delicious combination of beans that complement each other.
This medium roasted blend emanates a beautiful aroma of Lemongrass and walnuts, evocative of its natural surroundings. It has full bodied, dark chocolate notes that linger and finishes off with a smooth, Nutty aftertaste. Our medium roast blend is perfect for a Pour Over or a French Press.

item.g:title: Intenso Fermentation
item.g:description:
This nano-lot from Baarbara Estate was produced by adding yeast to the ripened cherries in a controlled environment. The fermentation process results in notes of candied fruits and berries in the cup with a prominent acidity and complexity.
This is the first year we experiment with yeast fermentation. For this lot, we chose a yeast called Intenso (Saccharomyces cerevisiae), intended to increase fruity flavours, mouthfeel and general cup quality.
We found a floral aroma and notes of pomegranate, cherry, candied fruit and a hints of prunes supported by a smooth mouthfeel and the best way to enjoy this is to either brew a pour over or an iced coffee.
We have cupped this coffee multiple times in different stages of harvest and roast profiles. It can be strange and puzzling (in a nice way) because the flavours are constantly developing. It's like watching your favourite movie, that you've forgotten.
Roasted for - Filter
Best brewed as -Pour Over and Iced Coffees

item.g:title: Tall Dark Handsome
item.g:description:
Tall Dark Handsome is our French Roast (dark roast) coffee, with the beans taken past the second crack in our profile roaster. The coffee has a dark, bitter-sweet and mildly smoky flavour. 100% single estate Arabica, perfect for milk-based coffee or a strong black coffee.
Bean: Arabica
Process: Washed
Roast Profile: French (dark) roast (Past the 2nd crack, oily)

item.g:title: Signature
item.g:description:
It symbolises the aromatic balance and roundness that defines our coffees and declares boldly their speciality status. Signature is a coffee for everyone; it’s full of rich character, and those with a discerning palate might even pick up a delicate resemblance to fine tea. The long and clean aftertaste remains sweet and fresh with a bold finish.
Not sure which grind to order? Checkout our grind size chart below for a quick brew tip!

item.g:title: MONSOON RAGA: MONSOONED MALABAR ROBUSTA
item.g:description: This Monsooned Malabar Robusta is a mellow, comforting experience with the aroma of hay infused with warm spices like cinnamon and nutmeg. The unique monsooning process transforms this Robusta into a smooth and inviting cup, perfect for those who appreciate a subtle kick.

item.g:title: Say Hello to Mellow
item.g:description: Say Hello to Mellow

item.g:title: Krishnagiri Estate
item.g:description: Krishnagiri Estate

item.g:title: Kalledevarapura Estate - Pulp Sun Dried
item.g:description: Kalledevarapura Estate - Pulp Sun Dried

item.g:title: Micro Climate
item.g:description:
Rich, mellow, intensely fruity, it offers an aroma laden cup. With its generous body and wholesome notes of candied fruit, it lends itself perfectly to filtered brew, pour overs or a French Press. A unique coffee from rare terroirs of gently sloping, diversely shaded highland micro-plots situated on a river island.
Not sure which grind to order? Checkout our grind size chart below for a quick brew tip!

item.g:title: Project Salawara Bros
item.g:description: Project Salawara Bros

item.g:title: Espresso Blend
item.g:description:
• Bold, Balanced, and Brew-Ready: A rich blend of washed and unwashed Arabicas from Chikmagalur and Coorg, designed for depth and versatility, It is equally delicious as a straight espresso or in milk-based drinks.
• Source You Can Trust: Ethically grown at high altitudes by small and medium farms dedicated to sustainable, responsible practices.
• Roasted Fresh, Delivered Fast: Roasted in micro-lots and shipped within 1–2 business days to ensure peak flavor and freshness.
Quick Details
Tasting Notes - Toffee, cocoa, dark chocolate Best For - Flair, Moka Pot, Bean to Cup Machines, All types of Espresso Machines Origin - Chikmagalur, Coorg Net Weight - 250g Altitude - 900–1,200m Process - Washed + Unwashed Arabicas Roast Level - Medium-Dark Varietal - Traditional Arabica Cultivars
What Makes Our Espresso Blend Unique?
• Optimized for Extraction: Roasted to unlock rich crema, dense body, and aromatic complexity, this blend thrives under pressure. • Milk-Friendly, Yet Bold Solo: Its strong structure holds up beautifully with milk but is equally satisfying as a straight espresso or Moka Pot brew. • Freshness You Can Taste: We roast to order and ship quickly to deliver a full-bodied, aromatic experience in every cup.

item.g:title: Pineapple Fermentation
item.g:description:
The Caffeine Baar is proud to present its most innovative offering, for which pulped coffee is fermented with fresh pineapple till the fruit and cherries break down into delicious flavours. This process is so unique that no two batches of coffee taste the same.
Roast Style - Filter
Recommended Brewing Equipment - Ristretto and Syphon

item.g:title: Basankhan Estate
item.g:description: Basankhan Estate

item.g:title: SOUL TRIBE Arabica
item.g:description: SOUL TRIBE Arabica

item.g:title: El Diablo
item.g:description: Our house blend might just remind you of dessert, and we’re perfectly okay with that. With bold notes of zesty orange, rich chocolate, and sweet brown sugar, this coffee is big-bodied, well-structured, and deeply complex. It’s what keeps our team at Third Wave Coffee going strong. Potent and flavorful on its own, or decadently indulgent with milk or cream, every sip is a delightful experience.

item.g:title: HIGHLAND BLUES Arabica
item.g:description: HIGHLAND BLUES Arabica

item.g:title: MONSOON RAGA: MONSOONED MALABAR ARABICA
item.g:description: MONSOON RAGA: MONSOONED MALABAR ARABICA

item.g:title: Cold brew - New Orleans Style
item.g:description:
dried coffee and roasted chicory root. This blend produces a strong, rich, deep and flavourful cold brew concentrate that tastes divine with a few ice cubes and some milk. Or condensed milk.
A quick history lesson? Thanks to the French influence in New Orleans, roasted chicory root added to roasted coffee became a thing among the locals. Initially meant to make coffee beans last longer thanks to the shortage caused during the war, this unique flavour in the brew developed a huge fan following well past the years of war.
Try this style of cold brew, especially if you like cold brew with milk or ice cream or cream or almond milk or condensed milk or.. ok, we're going to stop now.
Cold Brew - New Orleans Style is one of our 3 unique cold brew coffees for 2021. Check out the others here.
